title: Indulgent Smoke-Kicked French Ground Almonds Crumble
description: A fatty, crumbly indulgent french dish featuring ground nut oil and smoke-hot elements, perfect for a hot-pot vessel.

ingredients.name: Smoke flavoring (liquid smoke or wood chips)
Vanilla bean paste
ingredients.notes: 1/2 to 1 inch length of vanilla bean, seeds scraped out

ingredients.name: Water or fruit juice (for soaking almonds)

instructions: Soak ground almonds in water or fruit juice for at least an hour.
Drain and rinse almonds. Squeeze out excess moisture with a clean kitchen towel.
Preheat your hot-pot vessel to medium-high heat.
In a mixing bowl, combine ground almonds, ground nut oil, smoke flavoring, granulated sugar, caster sugar, vanilla bean paste, and butter until well combined.
Transfer almond mixture into the hot pot. Gently spread it evenly across the bottom of the pot.
Bake at 160°C (325°F) for approximately 45 minutes or until crumbs are crisp and golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve warm.
